name: True Leaf Brands Inc.
summary: True Leaf Brands Inc. manufactures and distributes hemp-based nutrition for pets. It sells dog chews, dental sticks, and supplement oils under the True Hemp brand name in North America and Europe, as well as through online on Amazon. The company was formerly known as True Leaf Medicine International Ltd. and changed its name to True Leaf Brands Inc. in May 2019. True Leaf Brands Inc. was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
